plugin_desc: NTI ENVIROMUX environmental monitor and remote sensor network-service SNMP baseline child template for devices under NTI PEN 3699. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts confirm internal, auxiliary, external and IP sensor tables, ACLM power tables, dry-contact, relay, message and alarm objects, but do not prove a stable shared scalar mapping for CPU, memory, fan or power health, so private environment, sensor and relay business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
